nasb.text: Since the beginning of time it has never been heard that anyone opened the eyes of a person born blind.

esv.text: Never since the world began has it been heard that anyone opened the eyes of a man born blind.

cnv.text: 自古以來，沒有人聽過生下來就是瞎眼的，有人可以開他們的眼睛。

ccb.text: 从创世以来，从未听过有人能把天生失明的人医好。

csbs.text: 自古以来，没有人听说过谁开了生来就瞎眼之人的眼睛。
